spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding for containers: p-6 or p-8
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Cardless or flat cards with 1px border (#E5E7EB) and no shadow by default. On hover, slight lift and shadow-sm.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Collapsible left-sidebar navigation for complex SaaS tool scalability. Fixed position.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Summary widgets: col-span-1. Primary data/charts: col-span-2 or 3. Feed/lists: col-span-1 row-span-2.

components.buttons: Flat, solid colors. Primary CTA in Jet Black (#0A0A0A) or Klein Blue (#002FA7). Hover state requires a visible color shift (e.g., hover:bg-gray-800).
components.inputs: Shadcn components, customized to use 1px border-gray-300, flat white background, rounded-md.
components.data_visualization: Use Recharts for basic charts (Donut charts for Credibility Scores, limited to 3 variables). Use progressive disclosure (overview first, details on demand).
components.knowledge_graph: Use react-force-graph-2d or custom SVG logic for node visualization to map sources.
components.explainable_ai: For text: highlighted spans with tooltip explanations. For images/video: overlaid heatmaps.
components.upload_zone: Interactive drag-drop zone: dashed border (border-gray-300), light gray background (bg-gray-50), clear typography.
components.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for sticky elements or overlays (e.g., backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80) with 1px bottom border.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp transitions. hover:bg-gray-100 for secondary elements. Buttons translate-y-[1px] on active.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets using Framer Motion (e.g., y: 10, opacity: 0 to 1 over 0.3s).
motion_and_interactions.data_loading: Skeleton loaders using animate-pulse instead of generic spinners for main content areas.

heatmap_analysis_sample.description: Deepfake analysis heatmap overlay on a human face photograph, showing anomalies. High tech research UI aesthetic.

video_deepfake_sample.description: A man in a suit speaks into a microphone. Use as placeholder for video analysis input.

text_misinfo_sample.description: A newspaper headline. Use as placeholder for text analysis.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements must include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-media-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex layout structures and override standard Shadcn component styles to match the 'Swiss High-Contrast' aesthetic.
Build a Left Sidebar layout. The main content area should be a dense dashboard.
Implement real-time credibility scoring UI with prominent visual indicators (Red/Yellow/Green).
Integrate the generated heatmap image into an 'Analysis Results' section to demonstrate the explainable AI capability.
Use 'react-force-graph-2d' or custom layout for a network graph showing source propagation.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans'. Load 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text via Google Fonts or custom font faces.
Ensure high accessibility, using dark gray/black text on off-white surfaces for perfect contrast.
Never use generic placeholder text; use contextual, realistic text for a misinformation analysis tool.
